parameters.formDescription: Enter client details to send the branded AI Receptionist welcome email with call forwarding instructions.

parameters.jsCode:
// Build Welcome Email with Call Forwarding QR Codes // Comprehensive: iPhone, Android, Business Lines, Grouped Carriers const input = $input.first().json; // Get settings data from the Merge Settings node const settingsData = input; // Try to get Twilio purchased number via cross-node reference (available when automated) let twilioNumber = ''; try { twilioNumber = $('Twilio: Purchase Phone Number').first().json.phone_number || ''; } catch (e) { // Twilio node not available (manual mode or Twilio disabled) - this is fine } // Phone number: prefer agent_phone_number from Settings, fallback to Twilio purchased number, then input const phoneRaw = settingsData.agent_phone_number || twilioNumber || input.agent_phone_number || input.twilio_number || input.phone_number || ''; const phone = String(phoneRaw); const companyName = settingsData.company_name || input.company_name || 'Your Company'; const agentName = settingsData.agent_name || input.agent_name || 'AI Receptionist'; const agentId = input.agent_id || ''; const leadEmail = settingsData.lead_email || input.lead_email || input.email || ''; // If no phone number, skip if (!phone) { return [{ json: { ...input, emailHtml: '

No phone number configured. Please set agent_phone_number in the Settings tab or provide it via the form.

', skipEmail: true, lead_email: leadEmail, company_name: companyName } }]; } // Strip non-digits for dial codes const digits = phone.replace(/[^0-9]/g, ''); // Format display number let displayNum = phone; if (digits.length === 11 && digits[0] === '1') { displayNum = '+' + digits[0] + ' (' + digits.slice(1,4) + ') ' + digits.slice(4,7) + '-' + digits.slice(7); } else if (digits.length === 10) { displayNum = '(' + digits.slice(0,3) + ') ' + digits.slice(3,6) + '-' + digits.slice(6); } // QR code helper function qr(code) { return 'https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=150x150&data=' + encodeURIComponent('tel:' + code); } // âââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââ // CARRIER GROUPS (identical codes grouped together) // âââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââ const carrierGroups = [ { name: 'AT&T, T-Mobile, Cricket, Mint Mobile, Google Fi, Metro by T-Mobile, Consumer Cellular', label: 'GSM Carriers', note: 'These carriers all use the same GSM standard forwarding codes.', fwdAll: '**21*' + digits + '#', fwdUnanswered: '**61*' + digits + '#', cancelAll: '##21#', cancelUnanswered: '##61#' }, { name: 'Verizon, Visible, Xfinity Mobile, Spectrum Mobile, US Cellular', label: 'Verizon Network Carriers', note: 'These carriers all use the same CDMA-style forwarding codes.', fwdAll: '*72' + digits, fwdUnanswered: '*71' + digits, cancelAll: '*73', cancelUnanswered: '*73' } ]; // âââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââ // BUILD HTML // âââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââââ let html = `

Your AI Receptionist is Ready!

${companyName} — powered by Syntharra

Hi there! Your AI receptionist for ${companyName} is live and ready to take calls. Below you'll find your dedicated phone number and complete instructions for forwarding your calls — whether you're on an iPhone, Android, a business landline, or using carrier dial codes.

Your AI Receptionist Number

${displayNum}

📱 iPhone — Settings App

Works on AT&T, T-Mobile, and most GSM carriers

Forward All Calls

  1. Open Settings
  2. Tap Phone (or Apps → Phone on iOS 18+)
  3. Tap Call Forwarding
  4. Toggle Call Forwarding ON
  5. Enter: ${displayNum}

Scan to call & verify

To Undo

Go back to Settings → Phone → Call Forwarding and toggle it OFF.

🤖 Android — Phone Settings

Samsung, Google Pixel, OnePlus, and other Android devices

Forward All Calls

  1. Open the Phone app
  2. Tap ⋮ (three dots) → Settings
  3. Tap Calling accounts or Supplementary services
  4. Tap Call forwarding
  5. Select Always forward
  6. Enter: ${displayNum} and tap Enable

Note: On Samsung, the path may be Phone → ⋮ → Settings → Supplementary services → Call forwarding.

Scan to call & verify

Forward When Unanswered Only

Follow the same steps above, but choose "Forward when unanswered" instead of "Always forward." This lets your phone ring first — if you don't pick up, the AI receptionist answers.

To Undo

Go back to Call forwarding → Always forward and tap Disable (or clear the number).

📞 Carrier Dial Codes

Open your phone's dialer, type the code, and press Call. Works on any phone.

`; // Loop through carrier groups for (const group of carrierGroups) { html += `

${group.label}

${group.name}

${group.note}

Forward All Calls

${group.fwdAll}

Scan to dial automatically

When Unanswered

${group.fwdUnanswered}

Scan to dial automatically

Undo Forward All

${group.cancelAll}

Undo Unanswered

${group.cancelUnanswered}
`; } html += `

🏢 Business Lines, Landlines & VoIP

Office phones, PBX systems, and internet-based phone services

📍 Traditional Landline

Pick up the handset and dial:

FORWARD

*72${digits}

CANCEL

*73

Wait for a confirmation tone or announcement after dialing.

Scan to forward

🌐 VoIP / Internet Phone Systems

RingCentral, Vonage, 8x8, Ooma, Grasshopper, Dialpad, etc.

  1. Log in to your provider's web portal or admin dashboard
  2. Navigate to Call Handling, Call Forwarding, or Routing Rules
  3. Add a forwarding rule to: ${displayNum}
  4. Choose "Always" or "When unanswered"
  5. Save your changes

Tip: Most VoIP providers also let you set forwarding from their mobile app under Settings → Calls.

📲 Google Voice

  1. Open Google Voice (voice.google.com or the app)
  2. Go to ⚙️ Settings
  3. Under Calls, find Call forwarding
  4. Add ${displayNum} as a forwarding number
  5. Verify the number when prompted

🖥️ Office PBX / Multi-Line Systems

Cisco, Avaya, Panasonic, Yealink, FreePBX, etc.

Contact your IT administrator or phone system provider to set up call forwarding to ${displayNum}. Most PBX systems support forwarding rules through the admin console. Common options include forwarding all calls, forwarding on no answer, or time-based routing (e.g., after business hours).

⚡ Quick Reference — Which Method Should I Use?

I have an iPhone Use the Settings App method above — it's the simplest
I have an Android Use the Phone Settings method — works on all Android phones
I want the fastest way Scan a QR code from the Carrier Dial Codes section — one tap and done
Settings method doesn't work Use your carrier's dial code instead — find your carrier above and scan the QR
I have a business landline Dial *72${digits} from your office phone
I use VoIP (RingCentral, etc.) Set forwarding in your provider's web portal
I only want missed calls forwarded Use the "When Unanswered" code or setting — your phone rings first, AI answers if you don't

✅ Next Steps

  1. Choose your forwarding method from the sections above
  2. Set up forwarding using the instructions or QR code
  3. Test it! Call your own number from another phone e AI receptionist picks up
  4. You're all set! Your AI receptionist will handle calls, capture leads, and send you notifications

To stop forwarding at any time, use the Undo instructions in each section above.

Need help? Reply to this email or contact us at

support@syntharra.com

© ${new Date().getFullYear()} Syntharra AI Solutions — Global AI Receptionist Provider

`; return [{ json: { ...input, emailHtml: html, lead_email: leadEmail, company_name: companyName, agent_name: agentName, skipEmail: false } }];

const d = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { status: 'sent', message: 'Welcome email sent to ' + (d.lead_email || 'unknown') + ' for ' + (d.company_name || 'unknown') } }];
